name: Plan First
model_policy: Use one coding assistant session. Require an explicit implementation plan before edits.
budget_policy: Spend up to 20% of the task budget on planning.
human_intervention_policy: Human may challenge the plan once before implementation.
steps: Write a short plan with risks and validation.
Implement only after the plan is accepted or self-reviewed.
Record transcript, diff, test log, review notes, and metrics.
